query:
ALTER TABLE credits 
  ADD COLUMN plan ENUM('free', 'starter', 'pro', 'studio', 'unlimited') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'free',
  ADD COLUMN stripeCustomerId VARCHAR(255) NULL,
  ADD COLUMN stripeSubscriptionId VARCHAR(255) NULL,
  ADD COLUMN subscriptionStatus VARCHAR(64) NULL;

UPDATE credits c
  JOIN subscriptions s ON s.userId = c.userId
  SET 
    c.plan = CASE s.plan 
      WHEN 'enterprise' THEN 'studio'
      ELSE s.plan 
    END,
    c.stripeCustomerId = s.stripeCustomerId,
    c.stripeSubscriptionId = s.stripeSubscriptionId,
    c.subscriptionStatus = s.status;

ALTER TABLE credits 
  ADD COLUMN plan ENUM('free', 'starter', 'pro', 'studio', 'unlimited') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'free',
  ADD COLUMN stripeCustomerId VARCHAR(255) NULL,
  ADD COLUMN stripeSubscriptionId VARCHAR(255) NULL,
  ADD COLUMN subscriptionStatus VARCHAR(64) NULL;

UPDATE credits c
  JOIN subscriptions s ON s.userId = c.userId
  SET 
    c.plan = CASE s.plan 
      WHEN 'enterprise' THEN 'studio'
      ELSE s.plan 
    END,
    c.stripeCustomerId = s.stripeCustomerId,
    c.stripeSubscriptionId = s.stripeSubscriptionId,
    c.subscriptionStatus = s.status;
